backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Digital Legacy Locker backend, wiring together authorization, user approval, blob storage, and persistent data types (user profiles, digital assets, nominees, death verification requests) with their corresponding endpoints.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (death verification request page, OTP verification step, confirmation card, admin review page, backend endpoints, navbar/landing page updates) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and any notable recent changes such as renamed types or new routes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes, including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Digital Legacy Locker – Dead Man's Switch' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes including public, authenticated, and admin-only pages, and renders a shared Layout with Navbar and Footer.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navigation bar that renders dynamic links based on authentication and admin status, including a 'Heir Verification' link for unauthenticated users and admin-only links for legal verification, access release, and death verifications.
frontend/src/components/SecurityBadge.ts: Reusable React component that renders styled badge pills for various security/status states (AES-256, E2E, pending, verified, etc.) using Lucide icons and Tailwind classes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state, persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the ICP backend, covering user profiles, digital assets, nominees, activity logs, and admin checks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for the dark-blue fintech color palette plus reusable badge component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AccessReleaseSuccessP: Success page displayed after digital asset access has been released to nominees, showing a timestamped release summary with security badges and navigation actions.
frontend/src/pages/AddAssetPage.tsx: A form page that allows authenticated users to add a new digital asset (platform credentials) by entering platform name, username, password, and category, then encrypting and saving it via the `useAddAsset` mutation.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDeathVerificatio: An admin-only page that lists death verification requests in a table and allows admins to approve or reject each request using confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLegalVerificatio: An admin-only page for approving or rejecting legal verification requests by principal ID, and displaying an activity log of all system events.
frontend/src/pages/ControlledAccessRelea: An admin-only multi-step page (credentials → OTP → confirm) that authorizes and records a controlled access release for a target user principal.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: The main authenticated dashboard displaying the user's asset summary, nominee status, legal verification state, category breakdown, and recent activity logs.
frontend/src/pages/DeathVerificationRequ: A multi-field form page that allows heirs to submit a death verification request, including uploading supporting documents (death certificate, ID proof), entering deceased/heir details, and completing an OTP confirmation step before submission.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: The public-facing landing page showcasing the platform's blockchain-secured digital inheritance features, with hero section, trust indicators, and CTAs for registration, login, and heir verification.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: A two-step login page that first authenticates the user via Internet Identity, then requires OTP verification (with a copyable generated OTP) before redirecting to the dashboard or registration based on profile existence.
frontend/src/pages/NomineeManagementPage: A page for authenticated users to view, add, and remove nominees (heirs), including uploading an ID proof file and selecting a relationship type, with confirmation dialogs for removal.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationPage.tsx: A multi-step registration wizard covering profile creation, OTP verification, ID document upload, nominee addition, and legal document upload, using Internet Identity for authentication.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color palette (including navy, sidebar, chart colors), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for a Digital Legacy Locker platform, documenting existing features, architectural notes, known issues, and versioned feature/requirement tracking for a dead man's switch app with AI-assisted death verification.
